title: Cherry Blossom Panorama
description: A beautiful cherry grove panorama for your Minecraft main menu
body:
![Cherry Blossom Panorama Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9acfe8fc135ac00956bedcdc1a2e14b5261a0201.png)

## 📜 ABOUT **Cherry Blossom Panorama** replaces the Minecraft main menu background with a warm sunset scene in a cherry grove biome, filled with soft fog and bees flying around. A high-quality panorama designed to create a cozy and relaxing atmosphere. **Works beautifully alongside my other vanilla-friendly [resource packs](https://modrinth.com/user/BlueHDGaming/resourcepacks).**
![Main Menu with Cherry Blossom Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/207dea756cca8118a25f7031c1614472d8527f2b.webp)
